---
author:
  - Patrick Roddy
  - "[Chris Gutschow](https://github.com/20DM)"
  - "[Connor Aird](https://github.com/connoraird)"
  - "[David Pérez Suárez](https://github.com/dpshelio)"
  - "[Duncan Leggat](https://github.com/dleggat)"
  - "[Hollie Rowland](https://github.com/hjrucl90)"
  - "[Jeremy Stein](https://github.com/jeremyestein)"
  - "[Jonathan Cooper](https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/59377)"
  - "[Samantha Ahern](https://github.com/quirksahern)"
  - "[Sofía Miñano](https://github.com/sfmig)"
date: 2026-06-09
format:
  revealjs:
    logo: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/87066407?s=200&v=4
institute:
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[UCL ARC](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing)"
  - "[Sainsbury Wellcome Centre](https://www.sainsburywellcome.org/)"
subtitle: "[ARC Forum](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/arc)"
title: Collaborations Workshop 2026
---

# Overview

## Collaborations Workshop

- Organised by the Software Sustainability Institute (SSI).
- Past outputs include the Research Software Engineering as a career path and
  the `CITATION.cff` file format.
- Three day "unconference".
- Emphasis on collaborations, dynamic discussions, and hands-on problem-solving.
- This year's theme was _Strengthening the Research Software Community_.

## Location

ICC Belfast

```{python}
from ipyleaflet import Map, Marker, basemap_to_tiles, basemaps

belfast = (54.59738870680214, -5.919148269637861)
ucl = (51.52460622303972, -0.13441106476677847)
places = (belfast, ucl)
m = Map(
    basemap=basemap_to_tiles(basemaps.OpenStreetMap.Mapnik, "2026-04-27"),
    center=(
        sum(coord[0] for coord in places) / len(places),
        sum(coord[1] for coord in places) / len(places),
    ),
    zoom=6,
)
for place in places:
    m.add_layer(Marker(location=place))
m
```

# Our Experience

## Paddy {.smaller}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.cell}

- Third Collaborations Workshop.
- The unlikely weather was welcome.
- Belfast is a good place to run.
- Enjoy a good mural.
- Discussion session was a about good practices for AI-generated software.
- Collaborative idea was about better education on how to perform a _good_ code
  review.
- Hack day <https://github.com/green-actions> {{< fa brands github >}}. A tool
  to compute the action usage for a given repository.

:::

::: {.r-stack}

![](figures/paddy/1.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Rainbow cake." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/2.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A mural of a woman and a dog."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/3.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A building being demolished."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/4.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Beacon of Hope sculpture."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/5.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="The Salmon of Knowledge sculpture."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/6.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Sunflower pub." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/7.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Belfast City Hall at night."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/8.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A physics mural." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/9.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Bluebells." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/10.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Lit up umbrellas." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/11.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Interior décor of a pub."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/12.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A high stair sculpture."
height=550}

![](figures/paddy/13.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A small bandstand." height=550}

![](figures/paddy/14.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Some of the UCL cohort."}

![](figures/paddy/15.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="My hack day team."}

:::

:::

## Jonathan

- First time invited to speak at CW, and first experience of a fireside chat
  (minus fire)
- Helped run 2 mini-workshops despite not being involved in submitting either
  proposal
- Plugged [DisCouRSE](https://discourse-network.github.io/) in an attempt to get
  NI engagement
  - Some useful chats, including with people who won round 1 projects
- Distracted by ARC admin work and missed several sessions

## Duncan {.smaller}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.cell}

- Second Collaborations Workshop.
- Belfast has a great vibe - many murals and live music everywhere!
- Ample welcome opportunities for large animal photos.
- **Conference itself**
- **Speed blog**: Can AI ever be 'Green'?
- **Collaborative idea sessions**: Domain2RSE
  - Framework to help guide conversations between domain experts and RSE
- **Hack day**: Green actions

:::

::: {.r-stack}

![](figures/duncan/1.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="The cathedral of the eponymous
Cathedral Quarter" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/2.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="St. Albert monument" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/3.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Mural #1" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/4.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Mural #2" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/5.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Delicious chips" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/6.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Golden gorilla"}

![](figures/duncan/7.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Sheep!" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/8.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="The Big Fish" height=550}

![](figures/duncan/9.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Duck" height=550}

:::

:::

## Connor {.smaller footer=false}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.cell .nonincremental}

- **Nice first day**
  - Ran to Belfast castle, walked up Cavehill, pizza and cinema.
- **Back to the Fortran Future Workshop**
  - Funding advice and Met office collaboration
- **Unconference**
  - Came third in the Discussion Sessions
  - Poetic computing
  - Came Third in hack day working on Fortran course
- **Final day**
  - Peace walls, botanic gardens, Ulster museum and hot chocolate

:::

::: {.r-stack}

![](figures/connor/shoes.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A stranger and I with the same
shoes." width=400}

![](figures/connor/castle.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Belfast castle." height=550}

![](figures/connor/cavehill-path.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="The path up Cavehill."
height=550}

![](figures/connor/cavehill-view.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="The view from
Cavehill." height=450}

![](figures/connor/cave.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Cavehill cave." height=450}

![](figures/connor/stromboli.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="My stromboli dessert."
height=550}

![](figures/connor/bad-photo.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A bad photo of Connor."
height=350}

![](figures/connor/better-photo.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A better photo of
Connor." height=350}

![](figures/connor/poetic-computing.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Poetic computing
poem." height=550}

![](figures/connor/mural.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A photo realistic mural."
height=550}

![](figures/connor/no-entry.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="A graffitied no entry sign."
height=550}

![](figures/connor/peace-walls.png){.fragment fig-alt="Map of Belfast peace
wall." height=250}

![](figures/connor/dragons.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Dragons sculpture from Ulster
Museum." height=400}

![](figures/connor/hot-chocolate.jpg){.fragment fig-alt="Frontage of Daisies hot
chocolate in Belfast." height=550}

:::

:::

## Sofía {.smaller footer=false}

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em"}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.cell .nonincremental}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=1}

- First Collaborations Workshop
  - Nice to meet the SSI Fellows Cohort of 2026 in person 🤓
  - The fellowship is to work further on the
    [Charlas RSE en español](https://charlas-rse-espanol.github.io/)

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=3}

- Meet some lovely people!
  - Led a mini-workshop with Salma Thalji on multilingualism in the RSE world
    🗺️🗣️ (and went together to a Rosalía concert the following week)
  - Hui Ling's
    [Git for researchers](https://wong-hl.github.io/git-for-researchers/)

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=4}

- And caught up with ARCians 😍
  - Excellent pubs were visited

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=5}

- 2nd prize at HackDay with
  [Up-Goer-Five](https://softwaresaved.github.io/up-goer-five/) project
  - (no photographic evidence 😬)

:::

:::

::: {.r-stack}

![](figures/sofia/charlas-transp-blanco.png){.fragment fragment-index=1
fig-alt="Charlas logo"}

![](figures/sofia/ssi-2026-cohort.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=2 fig-alt="SSI
Fellows cohort 2026"}

![](figures/sofia/mini-workshop.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=3 fig-alt="Mini
workshop"}

![](figures/sofia/no-evidence.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=5 fig-alt="2nd prize
hackday"}

:::

:::

:::

## Samantha {.smaller footer=false}

- **Came into CW26 tired, but excited**
  - Nice dinner with SSI Fellows celebrating DIRECT's 3rd birthday
- **Unconference**
  - Learnt that 2hrs does not condense to 30mins well
  - Came third in the Discussion Sessions
  - Had hoped to revisit RunTime, but not to be
  - Worked with some great folks on the Queer Coded website, creating drafts of
    logos
- **Bank Holiday weekend**
  - Spend the weekend visiting my Aunt
  - Nice walk around Donaghadee
  - Tormented in the best way by Autumn, my Aunt's dog

{{< include /_includes/qr-code.qmd >}}

## David {.smaller footer=false}

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em"}

::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.cell .nonincremental}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=1}

- Ninth Collaborations Workshop
  - ~Nice to see some of the SSI Fellows from my Cohort 2016~ Nope, none was
    there, but many from newer generations and one from 2014 🤗
  - It was nice to see 🧦 The Turing Way, OLS and SSI friends, including my RSE
    mentee

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}

Great talks by

- [Malvika: 5 conditions for a sustainable research ecosystem](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sjmRJQL8PoE&list=PLpX1jXuNTXGpnINIF2xORaytoVhYrmk0p&index=17)
  > when #AI accelerates the visible works it makes even more invisible the
  > non-visible work
- [Eleanor: The work behind the work: Building community & careers](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yV045U7Ot2w&list=PLpX1jXuNTXGpnINIF2xORaytoVhYrmk0p&index=16)

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=3}

CW is not about talks or sessions, but

- Meeting new friends!
- Learning new skills!
- And karaoke! 🎤
- And dance! 🕺

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=4}

{{< video figures/david/CI.webm >}}

:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=5}

🥇🥈🥉

:::

:::

::: {.r-stack}

![](figures/david/TTWsocks.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=1 fig-alt="SSI /
Collaboration Workshop. The Turing Way family posing with TTW socks"}

![](figures/david/20260513_Malvika_DavidThinking.png){.fragment fragment-index=2
fig-alt="I may have not believe everything Malvika said"}

![](figures/david/ARCFriends.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=3 fig-alt="An ARC
friend"} ![](figures/david/Knitting.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=3
fig-alt="David talking about OSPOs while knitting"}
![](figures/david/karaoke.jpg){.fragment fragment-index=3 fig-alt="people
singing and dancing karaoke while others do knitting in the front"}

:::

:::

:::
